workspace_setup.heading: Set up your Clark workspace
workspace_setup.error: Clark could not verify this workspace. Nothing was imported.

safe_recovery.heading: Clark stopped before changing your workspace
safe_recovery.destructive_cta: Roll back to last trusted version

connections.heading: Connections
connections.empty_state: No external capability has authority yet.

capability_trust_review.heading: Review capability authority
capability_trust_review.failure: This capability failed a required trust check.

credential_authorization.heading: Authorize this capability
credential_authorization.privacy_note: Clark stores the secret in Keychain, not in your workspace.

capability_health.heading: Capability health
capability_health.success: Capability is ready for governed use.

tool_pack_library.heading: Tool Packs
tool_pack_library.empty_state: No Tool Pack is active. Clark can evaluate a supported source.

tool_pack_review.heading: Tool Pack review
tool_pack_review.warning: Installation does not grant execution authority.

skill_library.heading: Agent Skills
skill_library.empty_state: No Skill has been promoted for this workspace.

skill_review.heading: Skill review
skill_review.failure: This Skill requests authority that is not available.

quick_capture.heading: Capture to Clark
quick_capture.safety_note: Capturing does not start research or generation.

canvas.heading: Canvas
canvas.empty_state: The graph will appear after the first capture.

review.heading: Review
review.stale_warning: This version changed upstream and needs a new decision.

impact_preview.heading: Preview downstream impact
impact_preview.warning: Existing approval will no longer authorize changed output.

publication_approval.heading: Approve publication intent?
publication_approval.safety_note: Clark will reconcile an ambiguous result before retrying.

reconciliation.heading: Reconcile this external action
reconciliation.warning: Do not retry until Clark can prove the prior intent did not publish.

export_package.heading: Publication export package
export_package.success: Export verified and linked to this publication intent.

observation.heading: Observation
observation.empty_state: No comparable observations are available yet.
observation.missingness_note: Some platform fields are unavailable or not comparable.

memory.heading: Memory
memory.empty_state: Clark has no active memory for this scope.
memory.governance_note: Clark never promotes memory without your decision.

memory_proposal.heading: Review memory proposal
memory_proposal.safety_note: This proposal is not used in retrieval yet.

client_pairing.heading: Pair an MCP client
client_pairing.safety_note: The client cannot approve work unless that scope is explicitly granted.

memory_history.heading: Memory history and influence
memory_history.caveat: Backup retention is shown before deletion.

forget_memory.heading: Forget this memory?
forget_memory.warning: Clark will show any backup copy that remains under retention policy.

recovery_summary.heading: Recovery summary
recovery_summary.success: Clark recovered your durable work without duplicating it.
